blockers.description: 2 pre-existing ty errors in storage.py carried from v1.1
blockers.workaround: Resolve or suppress before typecheck tox env can go green

decisions.decision: Replace async internals (httpx.AsyncClient + asyncio) with sync httpx.Client + ThreadPoolExecutor
decisions.rationale: asyncio.run() breaks when called from a running event loop (FastAPI, Jupyter, etc). ThreadPoolExecutor is simpler, equally fast for IO-bound batch ops, and works from any context.

decisions.decision: User-Agent now uses importlib.metadata version resolved at module import time
decisions.rationale: Was hardcoded as 0.1.0 even after version bump to 2.1.0

next_action: Run /gsd-plan-phase 14 to plan tox & Local Quality Gates
context_notes: Phase 13 (Version & Metadata) is fully complete and verified. A significant unplanned refactor was also completed: async internals replaced with ThreadPoolExecutor + sync httpx. 246 tests pass. Branch is create-sdk. Phase 14 requires tox-uv config covering py312/313/314 + lint/typecheck envs; note the 2 pre-existing ty errors in storage.py that will surface in the typecheck env.
